import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    BLUE = 3
    PICKUP_ACTION = 3

    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]

    # Pocket state checks
    holding_blue_pyramid_next = (
        (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) &
        (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )
    holding_blue_pyramid_curr = (
        (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) &
        (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )

    just_picked_up = holding_blue_pyramid_next & (~holding_blue_pyramid_curr)

    # Find blue pyramid on the grid (use current state)
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    pyramid_mask = (
        (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) &
        (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    )
    count = jnp.sum(pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyramid_on_grid = count > 0

    pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
    pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)

    # Agent positions (current and next)
    agent_y_curr = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_curr = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    dist_curr = jnp.abs(agent_y_curr - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_curr - pyr_x)
    dist_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - pyr_x)

    # Progress shaping: reward for getting closer (delta distance)
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W - 2)
    dist_progress = (dist_curr - dist_next) / max_dist  # positive = getting closer

    shaping_reward = jnp.where(
        pyramid_on_grid & (~holding_blue_pyramid_curr),
        dist_progress * jnp.float32(2.0),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Facing the blue pyramid bonus
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    # Check in next_state if agent is facing the pyramid
    dy_next = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx_next = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y_next = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_next, 0, H - 1)
    front_x_next = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_next, 0, W - 1)

    front_is_blue_pyramid = (
        (next_state.grid[front_y_next, front_x_next, 0] == PYRAMID) &
        (next_state.grid[front_y_next, front_x_next, 1] == BLUE)
    )

    # Also check if was already facing in current state (to give delta facing reward)
    dy_curr = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx_curr = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y_curr = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_curr, 0, H - 1)
    front_x_curr = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_curr, 0, W - 1)

    was_facing_blue_pyramid = (
        (state.grid[front_y_curr, front_x_curr, 0] == PYRAMID) &
        (state.grid[front_y_curr, front_x_curr, 1] == BLUE)
    )

    # Reward for newly facing pyramid (encourages alignment)
    just_facing = front_is_blue_pyramid & (~was_facing_blue_pyramid) & (~holding_blue_pyramid_curr)
    facing_reward = jnp.where(just_facing, jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Persistent small reward for facing pyramid (encourages staying aligned)
    persistent_facing = jnp.where(
        front_is_blue_pyramid & (~holding_blue_pyramid_next),
        jnp.float32(0.1),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Large success reward
    success_reward = jnp.where(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(10.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Small step penalty to encourage efficiency
    step_penalty = jnp.float32(-0.01)

    total_reward = success_reward + shaping_reward + facing_reward + persistent_facing + step_penalty
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
